title: ranunculus procurrentiformis
intro: Ranunculus procurrentiformis, also known as the lesser celandine, is a perennial plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It is used in traditional herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The plant is rich in alkaloids and flavonoids, providing various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. Ranunculus procurrentiformis can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve for topical application, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
